_comment: Inference cluster formation rules for BorgClaw Queen.
_comment2: Queen reads this at startup and on each GET /api/clusters to surface applicable rules.
_comment3: Actual cluster creation is done via POST /api/clusters/create — these are guidelines, not automation.

rules.name: dual-node-70b
rules.description: Two rpc-worker drones (min 16 GB VRAM each) can shard a 70B parameter model
rules.notes: Each node handles roughly half the model layers via llama.cpp --rpc flag

rules.name: quad-node-405b
rules.description: Four rpc-worker drones for frontier-scale models (405B+)
rules.notes: Requires llama.cpp built with RPC support on all nodes and the coordinator

rules.name: cpu-cluster
rules.description: CPU-only cluster for mid-size models when no GPU is available
rules.notes: CPU inference only — slower but functional for experimentation
